prompt: Write a measure for year-over-year sales growth % (this year vs same period last year) grounded in the Contoso-lite schema.

assertions.text: Builds on the existing [Total Sales] measure instead of re-summing Sales[NetAmount] from scratch
Uses DIVIDE for the percentage rather than the / operator
Uses SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR or DATEADD on 'Date'[Date] to get the prior-year value
Uses VAR to capture the current and/or prior value
References only tables/columns that exist in the schema (no invented columns such as Sales[Amount] or Sales[Date])
Notes that the calculation relies on the marked Date table
